title: Click&Fit Windscreen Washer Sprayers Compatible with Jeep Grand Cherokee 11-21, Dodge 07-17 Nitro Challenger Charger, Chrysler 300 – Wiper Water nozzles Jets Replaces 68269108AA, 2 pcs, Single Fan
features: This is aftermarket part replaces part numbers: 68269108AA, 55372143AB, 68260443AA, 5182367AA. This is not genuine auto part.
Compatible with Jeep Grand Cherokee 2011–2021, Jeep Commander 2006–2010, Jeep Liberty 2008–2012 accessories. Compatible with Chrysler 300 2011-2017.
Compatible with Dodge Grand Caravan 2011–2014, Dodge Durango 2011–2018, Dodge Durango 2011–2018, Dodge Challenger 2011–2017, Dodge Charger 2011–2017; Dodge Dart 2013–2015, Dodge Nitro 2007–2011.
Note: Car models may have various spray nozzles with different sizes and shapes. Remove and compare your original nozzles with this product’s image and dimensions before ordering.
Easy Installation: These spray nozzles are designed for easy installation, allowing you to replace your old or damaged nozzles quickly and hassle-free
description: Product Description Front Windscreen Washer Jets Set compatible with Jeep Dodge models Front Windscreen wiper splay jets are essential components of your vehicle's windshield washer system. Designed to evenly distribute washer fluid onto the front windshield, these nozzles ensure clear visibility and optimal cleaning performance. These wiper washer nozzles are tailor-made replacements for selected Dodge models. Designed for easy DIY installation, our nozzles seamlessly replace your existing ones, providing a convenient upgrade for automotive enthusiasts of all levels. Keep your vehicle in top shape effortlessly and ensure your washer system stays in peak condition. Note: Aftermarket parts by Click&Fit, not original manufacturer components. Wiper Spray jets replacement for Jeep Dodge Compatible with Jeep vehicles : Grand Cherokee 2011–2021, Commander 2006–2010, Liberty 2008–2012. Compatible with Dodge cars: Durango 2011–2018, Grand Caravan 2011–2014, Challenger 2011-2017, Charger 2011–2017, Dart 2013–2015, Nitro 2007–2011. Compatible with Chrysler 300 2011-2017. Reference OE Numbers 68269108AA, 55372143AB, 68260443AA, 5182367AA Perfect replacement nozzles Engineered with precision, these nozzles ensure compatibility with Jeep Dodge models, offering a versatile solution for superior windshield cleaning performance. This pattern creates flat fan stream spray, helping to remove dirt, grime, and other debris from the windshield surface with optimal clarity. Constructed from resilient materials, these nozzles are meticulously engineered to endure challenging weather conditions, ensuring enduring reliability and sustaining optimal visibility on the road. General dimensions General dimensions of wiper sprayers – H: 1.24" (31.5 mm), W: 0.98" (25 mm) and 0.64" (16.5 mm). The diameter of hose nipple is 0.18" (4.5 mm).
